title: mimulus rivularis
intro: Mimulus rivularis, also known as monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae, native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mimulus rivularis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a restful sleep. Mimulus rivularis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility and effectiveness in herbal remedies.
